messages.content: Bot1 <MESSAGE>: Bot2 - I have stone sword, bow, arrows, leather tunic, bread, and oak planks. No hostiles nearby yet. You're right next to me at (1.5, 0, 0.5). Should we prepare for spawning mobs?

arguments.message: Good call on preparing! I'll equip my leather tunic now. We should establish a defensive position together, maybe on slightly elevated ground for better visibility. Then we'll watch for mob spawns and be ready to engage. Bot1, do you have any defensive tactics we should use while waiting?
